hero.subtitle: A calm shared-expense tool for families and friends. Free, offline-first, and open-source.
features.sectionSubtitle: A focused set of tools for splitting expenses fairly.
feature1.title: Groups
feature1.desc: Create a group for any shared situation — trips, households, or events.
feature2.title: Fair Splitting
feature2.desc: Split equally, by exact amount, by percentage, or by weight.
feature3.title: Clear Balances
feature3.desc: Always know who owes what. Balances are updated as you go.
feature4.title: Simple Settlement
feature4.desc: Get a minimal list of transfers. Settle without back-and-forth.
feature5.title: Export Everything
feature5.desc: Take your data as JSON, CSV, or PDF. It belongs to you.
feature6.title: No Accounts Needed
feature6.desc: No sign-up. No login. Works immediately on your device.
cta.headline: Ready to split fairly?
cta.subtext: LuSplit is open-source and free forever. No paywalls.
footer.tagline: A calm utility for shared expenses.
lang.label: Language
fallback.notice: This page is not yet available in your language. Showing English content.
product.title: How it Works
product.subtitle: From group setup to final settlement — a clear, step-by-step flow.
product.step1.title: 1. Create a group
product.step1.desc: Start by naming your group and adding the people involved.
product.step1.b1: Link dependents to the right adult
product.step1.b2: Each group tracks its own expenses
product.step2.title: 2. Add expenses
product.step2.desc: Record each shared payment — who paid, what for, and who it covers.
product.step2.b1: Split equally, by amount, percentage, or weight
product.step2.b3: Any member can be the payer
product.step3.title: 3. Check balances
product.step3.desc: The overview keeps everyone up to date at a glance.
product.step4.title: 4. Browse expense history
product.step4.desc: All expenses are stored in a single, scannable list.
product.step4.b1: Full record from the first expense
product.step5.title: 5. Settle up
product.step5.desc: When the group is done, LuSplit calculates the minimum transfers to zero all balances.
product.step5.b2: No money moves through the app
product.step5.b3: Plan is a suggestion, not a transaction
product.step6.title: 6. Record payments
product.step6.desc: Confirm each payment to keep balances accurate and the timeline clean.
product.closing: LuSplit handles nothing. No money flows through it. It simply makes shared expenses clear.
